source: NVIDIA GTC 2026 Keynote + BEP Research estimates

platforms.notes: Decode offloaded to LPX — 10x revenue same power

derivation.title: The $300B/GW Math
steps: VR + LPX pod at Premium tier ($45/M): ~500K tokens/sec/MW -> ~$0.02/sec/MW -> ~$680K/MW/year
Scale to 1 GW: $680K x 1,000 = ~$680M/year at Premium alone
Jensen's $300B: Aggregates all five tiers, assumes high utilization, includes Ultra/$150 tier for multi-agent
Cloud provider revenue opportunity, not NVIDIA take rate
